update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.1 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Fixes — training / charm logic --- - Fix rest at high energy when all stats were skipped for low-gain charm at 0% failure (charm skip now requires failure above threshold). - Fix charm assumed in analysis when charm would never queue (per-stat mitigation checks; global bypass only during Climax). - Fix allowLowGainCharmAtZeroEnergy applying at ≤50% energy instead of only 0% energy. - Fix misleading "energy recovery needed" when the first training tab exceeded failure threshold (no longer skips analysis or mislabels the reason). - Skip full stat scan only when initial failure exceeds threshold AND no Good-Luck Charm or energy mitigation items are available. - Honor failure-mitigation pool reserve override (summerCharmOverrideMinStatGain) when deciding whether charms still warrant a full scan. - Prefer safe executable training fallback and mitigation-backed retry before backing out to rest. - Skip training analysis at 0% energy only when no charm or energy-restoring items remain.
